tagline: The Very Best in Hair - Skin - Nails - Lashes - Peels

hero.headline:
Two Generations of Salon
Excellence
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, Peles Salon & Spa has been Western Pennsylvania's premiere AVEDA destination. From expert color to rejuvenating spa treatments, our team creates a personalized luxury experience that keeps you looking and feeling your absolute best.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Beauty Care Under<br class="hidden md:block"> One Roof
services.subtitle: From precision cuts and organic color to relaxing spa treatments and lash extensions, Peles offers every service you need to look and feel extraordinary.

cards.title: Hair Services
cards.description: Women's and men's cuts, blowouts, updos, and iron services. Every visit begins with a complimentary consultation to create your custom signature style.

cards.title: AVEDA Organic Color
cards.description: 99% naturally-derived color formulas with nourishing oils for brilliant shine. Highlighting, balayage, ombre, glossing, toning, and corrective color.

cards.title: Spa & Facial Treatments
cards.description: Professional skincare using PCA Skin products. Customized facials, chemical peels, and rejuvenating treatments tailored to your skin's unique needs.

cards.title: Nail Services
cards.description: Full manicure and pedicure services in a relaxing environment. The perfect finishing touch to complete your salon experience at either location.

cards.title: Lashes, Waxing & Makeup
cards.description: Lash extensions and treatments, professional waxing, and makeup application for everyday beauty or your most special occasions.

cards.title: Extensions & Texture
cards.description: Keratin strand-by-strand bonded and tape-in extensions using premium human hair. Plus waves, relaxers, and the Supersilk Smoothing System.

how_it_works.headline: Your Peles Experience in Three Steps

steps.title: Book Your Consultation
steps.description: Call or book online at either our Greensburg or Johnstown location. We'll match you with the perfect stylist or specialist for your needs.

steps.title: Personalized Service Plan
steps.description: Your stylist begins with a complimentary consultation, considering your lifestyle, hair type, skin tone, and personal style to create a custom plan just for you.

steps.title: Leave Looking Incredible
steps.description: Walk out feeling confident and beautiful with results that last. Our team uses only the finest AVEDA and PCA Skin products to ensure your look stays stunning.

about.label: Why Clients Choose Peles
about.headline: Two Generations of Passion, One Standard of Excellence
about.description: Family-owned for over 40 years and spanning two generations, Peles Salon & Spa has earned its reputation as Western PA's premiere AVEDA destination. As a proud member of Intercoiffure America Canada, we hold ourselves to the highest international standards. Every stylist on our team is hand-selected and continuously trained to deliver results that exceed expectations.

features.title: Intercoiffure Member Salon
features.description: We belong to an elite international network of top salons, ensuring our techniques and standards meet the highest benchmarks in the industry.

features.title: 99% Naturally-Derived Products
features.description: As an exclusive AVEDA salon, every product we use is formulated with plant-based ingredients that are gentle on your hair, skin, and the environment.

features.title: Complimentary Consultations
features.description: Every service begins with a personalized consultation. We listen to your goals and create a custom plan tailored to your lifestyle and personal style.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: From a fresh cut to a full transformation, every service is delivered with AVEDA quality and personalized attention.

guarantee.headline: Our "Beautiful Results" Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not completely thrilled with your service, let us know within 7 days and we'll make it right at no additional charge. With 40+ years of excellence behind us, your satisfaction is the foundation of everything we do.

faqs.question: What makes Peles different from other salons?
faqs.answer: Peles is Western PA's premiere AVEDA salon and a member of the elite Intercoiffure America Canada network. With 40+ years of experience across two generations, we combine internationally-recognized expertise with 99% naturally-derived products for results that look stunning and feel amazing.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend booking an appointment to ensure you're matched with the right stylist and receive dedicated time for your service. Call us at 724-834-4400 or book online. We'll find a time that works with your schedule.

faqs.question: Which location should I visit?
faqs.answer: We have two convenient locations in Greensburg and Johnstown. Both offer the same high-quality AVEDA experience and full range of services. Choose whichever is most convenient for you.

faqs.question: What AVEDA products do you use?
faqs.answer: We exclusively use AVEDA products, including their Organic Color line with 99% naturally-derived formulas enriched with nourishing plant oils. For skincare, we use professional-grade PCA Skin products. All are available for purchase in our salon.

faqs.question: Do you offer bridal and special event services?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. From updos and blowouts to makeup application and lash extensions, we offer comprehensive bridal and special event packages. Book a consultation early so we can plan every detail of your look.

testimonials.name: Laura P.
testimonials.text: This is the best salon in the area. Jesse is amazing. I've been going to Peles for years. The quality of stylists and products are second to none.

testimonials.name: Bonnie D.
testimonials.text: I love going to Peles Salon. They are so easy to schedule with. The salon is gorgeous, clean and well lit. Katie S is such a confident, knowledgeable, and consistent stylist.

testimonials.name: Renny
testimonials.text: Expert stylists, botanical products, great vibe. Peles sets a high standard of expertise, quality of service and the best and safest hair products.

contact.subtitle: Book a complimentary consultation today. Our expert team will create a personalized plan to help you look and feel your absolute best.
